title: nigella carpatha
intro: Nigella carpatha, also known as the Carpathian nigella or black cumin, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nigella carpatha include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Nigella carpatha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
